allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $pgPath = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL" -Directory | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if \($pgPath\) { "$\($pgPath.FullName\)\\bin" } else { "NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\) + ";C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; psql -U postgres -c "CREATE USER rumbo_user WITH PASSWORD 'rumbo_pass';" 2>&1; psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE rumbo_db OWNER rumbo_user;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\) + ";C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin"; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\CONACMI\\Desktop\\Sistema_Personal_de_Vida\\backend"; python -m alembic revision --autogenerate -m "initial tables" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\CONACMI\\Desktop\\Sistema_Personal_de_Vida\\frontend"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "TypeScript: OK" } else { Write-Output "TypeScript: FAIL" })

PowerShell($env:Path += ";C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; psql -U postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS rumbo_db;" 2>&1; psql -U postgres -c "DROP USER IF EXISTS rumbo_user;" 2>&1; psql -U postgres -c "CREATE USER rumbo_user WITH PASSWORD 'rumbo_pass';" 2>&1; psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE rumbo_db OWNER rumbo_user;" 2>&1)
